info.title: CRAFT-ON API
info.description: Backend for CRAFT-ON — on-demand spot matching for construction tradespeople in Japan (Phase 1 MVP). See the crafton repo docs.

get.description: Liveness: the process is up. No dependencies checked.
Readiness: can we reach the database? Returns 503 if not.

post.description: Create the user on first login (role required) or return the existing one.

schema.title: Response List My Documents Api V1 Documents Me Get
Response Search Jobs Api V1 Jobs Get
Response My Jobs Api V1 Jobs Mine Get
Response List Saved Jobs Api V1 Jobs Saved Get
Response List Saved Job Ids Api V1 Jobs Saved Ids Get
Response List Applicants Api V1 Jobs  Job Id  Applications Get
Response My Applications Api V1 Applications Mine Get
Response My Matchings Api V1 Matchings Mine Get
Response List Messages Api V1 Matchings  Matching Id  Messages Get
Response Worker Reviews Api V1 Workers  User Id  Reviews Get
Response Contractor Reviews Api V1 Contractors  User Id  Reviews Get
Response List Notifications Api V1 Notifications Get

get.description: All users with profile + documents (full admin visibility).

schema.title: Response List Jobs Api V1 Admin Jobs Get
Response List Matchings Api V1 Admin Matchings Get

ApplicantOut.title: ApplicantOut
ApplicantOut.description: Applicant view for the contractor (worker summary embedded).

ConfigOut.title: ConfigOut
ConfigOut.description: Resolved config/flags snapshot (runtime override > env > default).

DocumentWithUrlOut.title: DocumentWithUrlOut
DocumentWithUrlOut.description: Document plus a signed read URL (admin vetting / owner view).

ErrorResponse.title: ErrorResponse
ErrorResponse.description: The uniform error envelope returned for non-2xx responses.

SessionCreateIn.title: SessionCreateIn
SessionCreateIn.description:
Body for ``POST /auth/session``.

On first login the user row is created and a role is required. On subsequent
logins the body is optional (an existing user is simply returned).

WorkerPublicOut.title: WorkerPublicOut
WorkerPublicOut.description: Public worker profile (docs/06: reviews, trust, trades).
